passive.name: Surging Tides
passive.description: When Nami's Abilities hit allied champions they gain Move Speed for a short duration.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Nami}} abilities grant a burst of {{sti|ms|{{as|movement speed}}}} to allied champions hit. The bonus is doubled from ''{{ai|Tidal Wave|Nami}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Nami's''' [[champion ability|abilities]] grant {{sti|ms|{{as|100|ms}}}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} to allied {{tip|champions}} hit, decaying over {{fd|1.5}} seconds. The bonus is{{ft|doubled|increased to {{as|200|ms}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}}}}from ''{{ai|Tidal Wave|Nami}}''.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Tidal Wave'' uses a separate empowered buff that has priority over the normal buff, and it will be used even if the full/current strength of the empowered buff is weaker than the full-strength normal buff.
** If the normal buff remains ongoing when the empowered buff expires, it will then begin with full strength and completely decay over its '''remaining''' duration.

Q.name: Aqua Prison
Q.description: Sends a bubble to a target area, dealing damage and stunning all enemies on impact.
Q.tooltip: Nami hurls a bubble, Stunning for {{ e2 }} seconds and dealing {{ totaldamagett }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nami}} tosses a bubble that lands at the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within as well as briefly {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} and {{tip|suspension|suspending}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|Suspension|nolink=true}}}} The target is stunned, but also marked as {{tip|airborne}}. Suspension can be reduced by {{sti|Tenacity}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nami''' launches a bubble at the target location that lands {{tt|after {{rutngt|0.7}}|after the cast time ends}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|suspension|suspending}} them for {{fd|1.5}} seconds, during which they are {{tip|standard sight|revealed}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Allied champions are granted {{ai|Surging Tides|Nami}} in a slightly larger area.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|200|Effect radius for enemies}} / {{tt|225|Effect radius for Surging Tides on allies, could also be 160 + edge radius, this is pending for test}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The combined time from the start of the cast time to the bubble landing is {{rutngt|0.25}} + {{rutngt|0.7}} = 0.99 seconds.
* ''Aqua Prison'' provides the status effect that allows {{ai|Last Breath|Yasuo}} to be cast.<ref>[http://www.reddit.com/r/leagueoflegends/comments/1s0gkx/were_the_yasuo_team_ama/cdsp1op Yasuo Reddit AMA]</ref>

W.name: Ebb and Flow
W.description: Unleashes a stream of water that bounces back and forth between allied and enemy champions, healing allies and damaging enemies.
W.tooltip:
Nami unleashes a stream of water that bounces between allied and enemy champions. Each champion can only be hit once, and it hits up to {{ maxtargets }} targets.Restores {{ totalheal }} Health to allies and will bounce to a nearby enemy champion. Deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to enemies and will bounce to a nearby allied champion.
The damage and healing value is modified by {{ bouncescaling }} each bounce. {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nami}} unleashes a stream of water onto the target champion or herself, which then bounces to nearby champions up to twice, alternating between enemies and allies and Nami.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Ebb and Flow'' {{tip|heal|heals}} allies and deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies, with subsequent bounces becoming less potent.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nami''' unleashes a stream of water onto the target champion or herself, which then bounces to nearby unaffected champions up to twice, alternating between enemies and allies and '''Nami'''.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Ebb and Flow'' {{tip|Heal|heals}} allies and deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies, with each bounce modifying the effectiveness of the next by -10% {{as|(+ 10% per 100 AP)}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* If cast on an enemy with a {{tip|spell shield}} they will not take damage but ''Ebb and Flow'' will still continue to bounce, and the target who blocked the ability may be targeted again by the final bounce.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

E.name: Tidecaller's Blessing
E.description: Empowers an allied champion for a short duration. The ally's basic attacks and spells deal bonus magic damage and slow the target.
E.tooltip: Nami empowers an allied champion's next {{ hitcount }} Attacks and Abilities for {{ buffduration }} seconds, causing them to Slow their targets by {{ totalslow }} for {{ slowduration }}s and deal an additional {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nami}} blesses herself or an allied champion for a few seconds, empowering their next three basic attacks or abilities to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow}} enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nami''' blesses herself or an allied champion for 6 seconds, empowering their next 3 [[basic attack]]s or [[champion ability|abilities]] to each deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and {{tip|slow}} enemies for 1 second.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Magic Damage Per Hit|{{ap|20 to 60}} {{as|(+ 20% AP)}}|Total Bonus Magic Damage|{{ap|20*3 to 60*3}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}}}
{{st|Slow|{{ap|15 to 35}}% {{as|(+ 5% per 100 AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Empowered abilities that apply {{tip|area damage}} only deal {{pp|key=%|33 to 66}} of the '''bonus''' damage to non-champions.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The effect will not trigger against [[structures]] nor [[ward]]s.
* The empowerment given to allies respects {{tip|enchantment redirection}}.
* Damage instances of ''Tidecaller's Blessing'' beyond the first do not count as separate applications for the purposes of {{ri|Electrocute}} and {{ri|Phase Rush}}.
wiki_detail.tips: * Allied champions can apply {{iis|Imperial Mandate}} {{nie|Coordinated Fire}} and trigger it on subsequent attacks on their own if '''Nami''' owns the item and empowers the ally with ''Tidecaller's Blessing'' .

R.name: Tidal Wave
R.description: Summons a massive Tidal Wave that knocks up, slows, and damages enemies. Allies hit gain double the effect of Surging Tides.
R.tooltip:
Nami summons a tidal wave, Knocking Up for 0.5 seconds, Slowing by {{ e4 }}%, and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. The duration of the Slow increases based on distance the wave traveled, up to {{ e5 }} seconds.

Allies hit by the wave gain double the effect of Surging Tides.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nami}} surges a tidal wave in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} and briefly knocks up enemies hit. The wave also {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies based on the distance traveled.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nami''' surges a tidal wave in the target direction, granting {{tip|sight}} around its trajectory as it travels, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit, {{tip|airborne|knocking them up}} for {{tt|{{fd|0.5}}|Estimated}} seconds, and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 70% for {{pp|type=distance traveled|2 to 4 by 0.2|0 to 2750|formula = ''Capped at 2750 range.''}} seconds.
_comments: * The wave places the caster slightly closer to '''Nami's''' cast position. ''what?''
